markdownRemark.excerpt: As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh, Due to the short notice in announcing the planned lecture tonight, the topic was changed to question and answer…
markdownRemark.html:
As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

Due to the short notice in announcing the planned lecture tonight, the topic was changed to question and answer. Thus, in order to reap the full benefit of the original subject, it was decided to have this lecture tomorrow night (Saturday Oct.15th) after al-Maġrib prayer, in-shāʾ-Allāh.

frontmatter.title: UPDATE: LECTURE: The Prostrations of Forgetfulness
frontmatter.description: with Al-Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān Muḥammad ʿAlī

frontmatter.title: Lecture: Avoiding the Pitfalls of Parenthood
